subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Let them alone. What would they do if a former king had reigned and a new king was now seated upon the throne? They must acknowledge the new king
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas
